title: Les trois mousquetaires, Volume 2 (of 2)
summaries: "Les trois mousquetaires, Volume 2 (of 2)" by Alexandre Dumas and Auguste Maquet is a novel serialized from March to July 1844. Young D'Artagnan, an 18-year-old Gascon, arrives in Paris seeking fortune as a musketeer. He befriends Athos, Porthos, and Aramis, forming an unlikely alliance. Together, these four heroes clash with Cardinal Richelieu and his agents—including the enigmatic Milady de Winter—to protect Queen Anne's honor. Filled with duels, intrigue, and swashbuckling adventure, this tale exemplifies the cape-and-sword romance. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
